key_facts: 3.2 GW distributed solar under management as of H1 2024
Ranked #2 in residential solar in China by user count
Founded October 2016 as Trina Solar's residential-solar spinout under '天合富家' brand
Positioned as 'China's first original residential PV system brand'
Digital omni-channel ecosystem: R&D + installation + after-sales + O&M
business_model_notes: Integrated residential solar system brand. Parent Trina Solar (688599.SH) supplies modules; Trinapower handles downstream EPC, O&M, and energy management. Competes on brand trust borrowed from parent's global panel reputation.
competitive_position: #2 in China residential installation by users. Main rival: Chint Anneng (#1 at 2M users). Strategy: leverage Trina's module manufacturing for lower BOM cost.
research_notes: Medium-high confidence. User count and GW figures from Trinapower investor deck (H1 2024). Independent verification limited — Trina Solar 688599.SH filings are Chinese-language only.
